• Must-Have Current Task

  1. Camera permission/error path is user-recoverable.

     deny shows Camera permission blocked, recovery copy, and Retry Camera.
  2. Audio alarm requires explicit enablement and respects mute.
     Verification: automated tests confirm no tone before opt-in, tone after
     Enable Audio Alarm, and no oscillator playback after Mute Audio Alarm;
     manual QA confirms audible/non-audible behavior in browser.
  3. Current slice passes baseline project checks.
     Verification: run npm run lint, npm run test, npm run build; expected
     result is all pass before PR #1 can be accepted.

  Follow-Up

  4. Add browser-level camera QA coverage.
     Verification: Playwright or equivalent smoke test validates allow/deny/
     unsupported camera states, or README documents the remaining manual-only
     camera coverage clearly.
